nasb.text: At the end of ten days their appearance seemed better and they were fatter than all the youths who had been eating the king’s choice food.

esv.text: At the end of ten days it was seen that they were better in appearance and fatter in flesh than all the youths who ate the king’s food.

cnv.text: 過了十天，見他們的容貌比所有享用王的佳餚的年輕人，更加俊美健壯。

ccb.text: 十天后，但以理和他三个朋友看上去比那些用御膳的青年更俊美健康。
